_schema.note: One source-of-truth file per reel. Authored fields are written up front; phase fields are filled in by each phase and saved back here. The still/video runner PREPENDS style_bible (visual_style + color_palette + lighting_style) to every image_prompt/video_prompt, so per-beat prompts carry only the scene specifics — style stays centralized and consistent.

style_bible.visual_style: Cinematic miniature stop-motion claymation, deeply textured old-world handcrafted fantasy art with soft atmospheric depth-of-field.
style_bible.color_palette: deep amber, indigo blue, oxidized copper, warm gold, shadow black
style_bible.lighting_style: chiaroscuro, dramatic golden light shafts cutting through dusty shadow-filled space

characters.name: Silas
characters.visual_description: an elderly watchmaker, kind wrinkled face, round wire-rimmed spectacles, a brown leather apron over a woolen shirt

settings.name: The Workshop
settings.visual_description: a cozy, dimly lit vintage watchmaker shop packed with thousands of ticking brass gears and antique clocks

beats.narration_text: This is Liam, in for Bear. Silas sat at his cluttered wooden workbench, surrounded by hundreds of softly ticking brass clocks.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Silas sat at his cluttered wooden workbench, surrounded by hundreds of softly ticking brass clocks.
beats.scene_description: Silas sits quietly at a workbench surrounded by antique clocks under a soft golden glow.
beats.image_prompt: Silas sits at a cluttered wooden workbench surrounded by hundreds of antique brass clocks, soft golden glow, wide eye-level framing
beats.video_prompt: static eye-level shot; the clocks tick, dust drifts through the light, Silas breathes quietly

build.suggested: suggested prompt: static eye-level shot; the clocks tick, dust drifts through the light, Silas breathes quietly

beats.narration_text: He carefully placed a tiny gold gear into the delicate heart of an ancient pocket watch.
beats.tts_normalized_text: He carefully placed a tiny gold gear into the delicate heart of an ancient pocket watch.
beats.scene_description: Wrinkled hands use fine tweezers to lower a miniature brass gear into an open pocket watch.
beats.image_prompt: macro close-up of wrinkled hands using fine metal tweezers to lower a tiny brass gear into an open pocket watch casing, warm focused light, shallow depth of field
beats.video_prompt: slow push-in to the tweezers; the gear lowers into the watch, hands steady

build.suggested: suggested prompt: slow push-in to the tweezers; the gear lowers into the watch, hands steady

beats.narration_text: Suddenly, a brilliant blue mechanical butterfly fluttered out from a dusty wooden shelf in the dark corner.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Suddenly, a brilliant blue mechanical butterfly fluttered out from a dusty wooden shelf in the dark corner.
beats.scene_description: A glowing azure clockwork butterfly emerges from a dark wooden shelf, wings shimmering with blue sparks.
beats.image_prompt: a glowing azure clockwork butterfly emerging from a dark dusty wooden shelf in a shadowed corner, bioluminescent blue sparks on its wings
beats.video_prompt: slow pan across the dark shelf, revealing the glowing butterfly as it flutters out

build.suggested: suggested prompt: slow pan across the dark shelf, revealing the glowing butterfly as it flutters out

beats.narration_text: The shimmering creature hovered gracefully in front of his tired eyes, casting a soft azure light.
beats.tts_normalized_text: The shimmering creature hovered gracefully in front of his tired eyes, casting a soft azure light.
beats.scene_description: The glowing butterfly hovers in mid-air, casting blue light across Silas's surprised face.
beats.image_prompt: a glowing blue clockwork butterfly hovering mid-air, casting rippling azure light across the surprised face of the elderly watchmaker
beats.video_prompt: slow push-in; the butterfly hovers and casts shifting blue light on his face

build.suggested: suggested prompt: slow push-in; the butterfly hovers and casts shifting blue light on his face

beats.narration_text: He reached out his wrinkled hand as the glowing clockwork insect landed gently on his index finger.
beats.tts_normalized_text: He reached out his wrinkled hand as the glowing clockwork insect landed gently on his index finger.
beats.scene_description: A wrinkled finger extends as the glowing blue insect lands gently on the fingertip.
beats.image_prompt: a wrinkled finger extended as a shimmering blue clockwork butterfly lands on the fingertip, shallow focus, warm-and-blue contrast
beats.video_prompt: slow push-in; the finger extends and the butterfly settles onto the fingertip by ~4s

build.suggested: suggested prompt: slow push-in; the finger extends and the butterfly settles onto the fingertip by ~4s

beats.narration_text: Silas smiled warmly, realizing that his grandest and most beautiful creation had finally come to life.
beats.tts_normalized_text: Silas smiled warmly, realizing that his grandest and most beautiful creation had finally come to life.
beats.scene_description: Silas smiles with tearful eyes as blue light radiates from the butterfly on his hand.
beats.image_prompt: the elderly watchmaker smiles with tearful eyes as bright blue light radiates from the mechanical butterfly resting on his hand
beats.video_prompt: slow pull-back; Silas smiles, the blue glow warms, resolving to a wider frame

build.suggested: suggested prompt: slow pull-back; Silas smiles, the blue glow warms, resolving to a wider frame

_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

skin_warnings: NO RENDERABLE BEATS: no beat carries a shot.remotion.pattern or Manim annotation — the pipeline will render NOTHING and every slot becomes a YOU-slate. The sheet was authored without the scene contract.
B01: palette=claude but the cold open is 'un-annotated' — COLD OPEN LAW wants ClaudeComposerAsk
B06: palette=claude but the outro is 'un-annotated' — OUTRO LAW wants ClaudeTitleOutro
